questionnaire.business_context: HelpDesk Pro is a B2B SaaS platform managing customer support tickets across email, chat, social media. 500+ companies, $2K-$15K MRR. 40% churn spike at month 6. Weak onboarding suspected (integration issues). 200% YoY growth but retention flatlined.
questionnaire.goal: Reduce churn from 34.7% to 20% in 90 days
edge_cases: Win-back campaign failed (12% ROI, $8K cost). Onboarding not scaling with sales. CEO wants upsell focus. AI feature launch in 4 months.
